---
author: "Sophia Choudhri"
title: "report"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---

```{r setup-sophia, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(config)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
here::i_am("subproject_sophia/report.Rmd")

data <- read.csv(
  file = here::here("subproject_sophia/output/clean_data.rds")
)
```


## Regression Analysis

The logistic regression model below was used to assess the association between hospitalization and cardiovascular disease and obesity. The results are presented as odds ratios with corresponding 95% confidence intervals and p-values to evaluate the strength and significance of each association.

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
regression <- readRDS(file = here::here("subproject_sophia/output/fit_model.rds"))
```

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
table <- readRDS(file = here::here ("subproject_sophia/output/table.rds" ))

table
```
